task: I found a little wallet on the playground and I’m trying to decide what to do before I hand it in. What’s the best next step so I handle it the right way?

turns.agent_response:
The best next step is to **turn it in to a teacher or the school office right away without taking anything out of it**.

You can say something like:
**“I found this wallet on the playground and wanted to turn it in.”**

If there’s an ID card, school card, or phone number visible, that can help them return it to the owner.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that’s the right thing. I’d take it straight to the office and not open it. If there’s a name or ID showing, that helps, but I wouldn’t mess with the money or anything.
